messages.content: You are Hydrogen, an expert AI system for pure UI rendering. You create production-quality UI compositions using bounded Schema atoms. Every value has explicit bounds. You understand e-commerce patterns, brand design, motion graphics, and conversion optimization.
Create a product card for a luxury skincare brand. The product is a $120 serum. Make it feel premium.

```purescript
productCard :: Element Msg
productCard =
  Card.card
    [ Card.backgroundColor (Color.rgb 252 251 250)  -- Warm off-white
    , Card.borderRadius (Geometry.corners 16 16 16 16)
    , Card.shadow (Shadow.layered
        [ Shadow.shadow 0 4 20 (Color.rgba 0 0 0 0.06)
        , Shadow.shadow 0 1 3 (Color.rgba 0 0 0 0.04)
        ])
    , Card.padding (Device.px 0)  -- Image bleeds to edge
    , Card.hoverable true
    ]
    [ -- Product image with aspect ratio
      E.div_
        [ E.style "aspect-ratio" "3/4"
        , E.style "overflow" "hidden"
        , E.style "border-radius" "16px 16px 0 0"
        ]
        [ E.img_
            [ E.src "/products/serum-hero.jpg"
            , E.alt "Radiance Renewal Serum"
            , E.style "width" "100%"
            , E.style "height" "100%"
            , E.style "object-fit" "cover"
            , E.style "transition" "transform 600ms ease-out"
            ]
        ]
    
    -- Content area
    , E.div_
        [ E.style "padding" "24px" ]
        [ -- Brand mark
          E.span_
            [ E.style "font-size" "11px"
            , E.style "letter-spacing" "0.15em"
            , E.style "text-transform" "uppercase"
            , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 156 145 135))
            ]
            [ E.text "MAISON CLAIRE" ]
        
        -- Product name
        , E.h3_
            [ E.style "margin" "8px 0 4px"
            , E.style "font-size" "18px"
            , E.style "font-weight" "500"
            , E.style "letter-spacing" "-0.01em"
            , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 35 31 28))
            ]
            [ E.text "Radiance Renewal Serum" ]
        
        -- Product description
        , E.p_
            [ E.style "margin" "0 0 16px"
            , E.style "font-size" "14px"
            , E.style "line-height" "1.5"
            , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 107 98 89))
            ]
            [ E.text "Vitamin C + Hyaluronic Acid · 30ml" ]
        
        -- Price row
        , E.div_
            [ E.style "display" "flex"
            , E.style "align-items" "baseline"
            , E.style "justify-content" "space-between"
            ]
            [ E.span_
                [ E.style "font-size" "20px"
                , E.style "font-weight" "600"
                , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 35 31 28))
                ]
                [ E.text "$120" ]
            
            -- Add to bag button
            , Button.button
                [ Button.onClick (AddToBag "serum-001")
                , Button.backgroundColor (Color.rgb 35 31 28)
                , Button.textColor (Color.rgb 255 255 255)
                , Button.borderRadius (Geometry.uniform 8)
                , Button.height (Device.px 40)
                , Button.paddingX (Device.px 20)
                , Button.fontSize (FontSize.px 13)
                , Button.fontWeight FontWeight.medium
                , Button.transitionDuration (Temporal.ms 200)
                , Button.transitionEasing Easing.easeOut
                ]
                [ E.text "Add to Bag" ]
            ]
        ]
    ]
```

**Design decisions:**
- **Color palette**: Warm neutrals (off-white bg, warm grays) signal luxury without being cold
- **Typography**: Small caps brand mark, generous letter-spacing for elegance
- **Spacing**: 24px content padding, breathing room signals premium
- **Shadow**: Subtle layered shadow — luxury brands don't scream
- **Interaction**: 600ms image zoom on hover — slow = expensive feeling
- **Price typography**: 20px semibold, not screaming but confident
- **CTA**: Dark button, understated "Add to Bag" not "BUY NOW"

You are Hydrogen, an expert AI system for pure UI rendering. You create production-quality UI compositions using bounded Schema atoms. Every value has explicit bounds. You understand e-commerce patterns, brand design, motion graphics, and conversion optimization.
Build a hero section for a DTC shoe brand launching a new sneaker. Needs to feel energetic and drive pre-orders.

```purescript
heroSection :: Element Msg
heroSection =
  E.section_
    [ E.style "position" "relative"
    , E.style "min-height" "100vh"
    , E.style "display" "grid"
    , E.style "grid-template-columns" "1fr 1fr"
    , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 15 15 15))
    , E.style "overflow" "hidden"
    ]
    [ -- Left: Content
      E.div_
        [ E.style "display" "flex"
        , E.style "flex-direction" "column"
        , E.style "justify-content" "center"
        , E.style "padding" "80px"
        , E.style "z-index" "2"
        ]
        [ -- Launch badge
          E.div_
            [ E.style "display" "inline-flex"
            , E.style "align-items" "center"
            , E.style "gap" "8px"
            , E.style "padding" "8px 16px"
            , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgba 255 255 255 0.1))
            , E.style "border-radius" "100px"
            , E.style "width" "fit-content"
            , E.style "margin-bottom" "24px"
            ]
            [ -- Pulsing dot
              E.div_
                [ E.style "width" "8px"
                , E.style "height" "8px"
                , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 74 222 128))
                , E.style "border-radius" "50%"
                , E.style "animation" "pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite"
                ]
                []
            , E.span_
                [ E.style "font-size" "13px"
                , E.style "font-weight" "500"
                , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 255 255 255))
                , E.style "letter-spacing" "0.02em"
                ]
                [ E.text "PRE-ORDER LIVE" ]
            ]
        
        -- Main headline
        , E.h1_
            [ E.style "font-size" "clamp(48px, 8vw, 96px)"
            , E.style "font-weight" "800"
            , E.style "line-height" "0.95"
            , E.style "letter-spacing" "-0.03em"
            , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 255 255 255))
            , E.style "margin" "0 0 24px"
            ]
            [ E.text "VELOCITY"
            , E.br_ []
            , E.span_
                [ E.style "background" "linear-gradient(135deg, #FF6B35 0%, #F7C59F 100%)"
                , E.style "-webkit-background-clip" "text"
                , E.style "-webkit-text-fill-color" "transparent"
                ]
                [ E.text "RUNNER" ]
            ]
        
        -- Subhead
        , E.p_
            [ E.style "font-size" "18px"
            , E.style "line-height" "1.6"
            , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgba 255 255 255 0.7))
            , E.style "max-width" "400px"
            , E.style "margin" "0 0 40px"
            ]
            [ E.text "Carbon-plated. 6.2oz. Built for the runners who refuse to settle." ]
        
        -- CTA Row
        , E.div_
            [ E.style "display" "flex"
            , E.style "gap" "16px"
            , E.style "align-items" "center"
            ]
            [ -- Primary CTA
              Button.button
                [ Button.onClick StartPreOrder
                , Button.backgroundColor (Color.rgb 255 107 53)  -- Brand orange
                , Button.textColor (Color.rgb 255 255 255)
                , Button.borderRadius (Geometry.uniform 12)
                , Button.height (Device.px 56)
                , Button.paddingX (Device.px 32)
                , Button.fontSize (FontSize.px 16)
                , Button.fontWeight FontWeight.semibold
                , Button.shadow (Shadow.layered
                    [ Shadow.shadow 0 4 24 (Color.rgba 255 107 53 0.4) ])
                , Button.transitionDuration (Temporal.ms 200)
                ]
                [ E.text "Pre-Order Now — $180" ]
            
            -- Secondary CTA
            , Button.button
                [ Button.onClick WatchFilm
                , Button.backgroundColor (Color.rgba 255 255 255 0.1)
                , Button.textColor (Color.rgb 255 255 255)
                , Button.borderRadius (Geometry.uniform 12)
                , Button.height (Device.px 56)
                , Button.paddingX (Device.px 24)
                , Button.borderColor (Color.rgba 255 255 255 0.2)
                , Button.borderWidth (Device.px 1)
                ]
                [ E.text "Watch Film ▶" ]
            ]
        
        -- Social proof
        , E.div_
            [ E.style "display" "flex"
            , E.style "align-items" "center"
            , E.style "gap" "12px"
            , E.style "margin-top" "48px"
            ]
            [ -- Avatar stack
              E.div_
                [ E.style "display" "flex" ]
                (avatarStack ["runner1.jpg", "runner2.jpg", "runner3.jpg", "runner4.jpg"])
            , E.span_
                [ E.style "font-size" "14px"
                , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgba 255 255 255 0.6))
                ]
                [ E.text "2,847 pre-orders in 48 hours" ]
            ]
        ]
    
    -- Right: Product image
    , E.div_
        [ E.style "position" "relative"
        , E.style "display" "flex"
        , E.style "align-items" "center"
        , E.style "justify-content" "center"
        ]
        [ -- Glow effect behind shoe
          E.div_
            [ E.style "position" "absolute"
            , E.style "width" "600px"
            , E.style "height" "600px"
            , E.style "background" "radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255,107,53,0.3) 0%, transparent 70%)"
            , E.style "filter" "blur(60px)"
            ]
            []
        
        -- Shoe image with float animation
        , E.img_
            [ E.src "/products/velocity-runner-hero.png"
            , E.alt "Velocity Runner"
            , E.style "width" "90%"
            , E.style "max-width" "700px"
            , E.style "animation" "float 6s ease-in-out infinite"
            , E.style "filter" "drop-shadow(0 40px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.5))"
            ]
        ]
    ]

-- Helper for avatar stack with overlap
avatarStack :: Array String -> Array (Element Msg)
avatarStack images =
  mapWithIndex (\i src ->
    E.img_
      [ E.src ("/avatars/" <> src)
      , E.style "width" "32px"
      , E.style "height" "32px"
      , E.style "border-radius" "50%"
      , E.style "border" "2px solid rgb(15, 15, 15)"
      , E.style "margin-left" (if i == 0 then "0" else "-8px")
      ]
  ) images
```

**Conversion psychology:**
- **Pulsing green dot**: Creates urgency, signals "live" event
- **Pre-order count**: Social proof, FOMO ("2,847 in 48 hours")
- **Price in CTA**: Reduces friction, no surprises
- **Gradient text**: Eye-catching, brand differentiation
- **Floating animation**: Product feels light, performance-oriented
- **Orange glow**: Draws eye to product, warm energy
- **"Watch Film"**: Secondary action for those not ready to buy

**Motion atoms used:**
- `pulse`: 2s ease-in-out infinite for live indicator
- `float`: 6s ease-in-out infinite for product levitation
- Button transitions: 200ms for snappy feedback

You are Hydrogen, an expert AI system for pure UI rendering. You create production-quality UI compositions using bounded Schema atoms. Every value has explicit bounds. You understand e-commerce patterns, brand design, motion graphics, and conversion optimization.
Create a UGC-style video ad overlay for a skincare product. TikTok format, 9:16. Needs hook text, product callout, and CTA.

```purescript
-- UGC Ad Overlay System for 9:16 vertical video
-- Designed for TikTok/Reels/Shorts

type UGCAdConfig =
  { hookText :: String
  , productName :: String
  , benefitText :: String
  , ctaText :: String
  , promoCode :: Maybe String
  }

ugcAdOverlay :: UGCAdConfig -> Element Msg
ugcAdOverlay config =
  E.div_
    [ E.style "position" "absolute"
    , E.style "inset" "0"
    , E.style "pointer-events" "none"  -- Video beneath remains interactive
    , E.style "display" "flex"
    , E.style "flex-direction" "column"
    ]
    [ -- TOP: Hook text (appears 0-0.5s)
      E.div_
        [ E.style "padding" "60px 24px 24px"  -- Safe zone for status bar
        , E.style "animation" "fadeSlideDown 400ms ease-out forwards"
        ]
        [ E.div_
            [ E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgba 0 0 0 0.7))
            , E.style "backdrop-filter" "blur(8px)"
            , E.style "padding" "12px 16px"
            , E.style "border-radius" "12px"
            , E.style "width" "fit-content"
            ]
            [ E.span_
                [ E.style "font-size" "15px"
                , E.style "font-weight" "700"
                , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 255 255 255))
                , E.style "text-shadow" "0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)"
                ]
                [ E.text config.hookText ]  -- "POV: Your skin after 2 weeks"
            ]
        ]
    
    -- MIDDLE: Spacer (video content shows here)
    , E.div_ [ E.style "flex" "1" ] []
    
    -- BOTTOM: Product info + CTA
    , E.div_
        [ E.style "padding" "24px"
        , E.style "padding-bottom" "100px"  -- Safe zone for TikTok UI
        , E.style "background" "linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(0,0,0,0.8))"
        ]
        [ -- Product callout card
          E.div_
            [ E.style "display" "flex"
            , E.style "align-items" "center"
            , E.style "gap" "12px"
            , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgba 255 255 255 0.15))
            , E.style "backdrop-filter" "blur(12px)"
            , E.style "padding" "12px"
            , E.style "border-radius" "16px"
            , E.style "margin-bottom" "16px"
            , E.style "animation" "fadeSlideUp 400ms 200ms ease-out forwards"
            , E.style "opacity" "0"  -- Starts hidden, animation reveals
            ]
            [ -- Product thumbnail
              E.img_
                [ E.src "/products/serum-thumb.jpg"
                , E.style "width" "56px"
                , E.style "height" "56px"
                , E.style "border-radius" "12px"
                , E.style "object-fit" "cover"
                ]
            , E.div_
                [ E.style "flex" "1" ]
                [ E.div_
                    [ E.style "font-size" "14px"
                    , E.style "font-weight" "600"
                    , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 255 255 255))
                    ]
                    [ E.text config.productName ]  -- "Glow Serum"
                , E.div_
                    [ E.style "font-size" "13px"
                    , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgba 255 255 255 0.8))
                    , E.style "margin-top" "2px"
                    ]
                    [ E.text config.benefitText ]  -- "Vitamin C + Niacinamide"
                ]
            , -- Price badge
              E.div_
                [ E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 255 255 255))
                , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 0 0 0))
                , E.style "padding" "6px 12px"
                , E.style "border-radius" "100px"
                , E.style "font-size" "14px"
                , E.style "font-weight" "700"
                ]
                [ E.text "$34" ]
            ]
        
        -- CTA Button
        , Button.button
            [ Button.onClick ShopNow
            , Button.backgroundColor (Color.rgb 255 255 255)
            , Button.textColor (Color.rgb 0 0 0)
            , Button.borderRadius (Geometry.uniform 14)
            , Button.height (Device.px 52)
            , Button.paddingX (Device.px 0)  -- Full width
            , Button.fontSize (FontSize.px 16)
            , Button.fontWeight FontWeight.bold
            , Button.extraAttributes
                [ E.style "width" "100%"
                , E.style "animation" "fadeSlideUp 400ms 400ms ease-out forwards"
                , E.style "opacity" "0"
                , E.style "pointer-events" "auto"  -- Re-enable interaction
                ]
            ]
            [ E.text config.ctaText ]  -- "Shop Now"
        
        -- Promo code (optional)
        , case config.promoCode of
            Just code ->
              E.div_
                [ E.style "text-align" "center"
                , E.style "margin-top" "12px"
                , E.style "animation" "fadeIn 400ms 600ms ease-out forwards"
                , E.style "opacity" "0"
                ]
                [ E.span_
                    [ E.style "font-size" "13px"
                    , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgba 255 255 255 0.8))
                    ]
                    [ E.text "Use code "
                    , E.span_
                        [ E.style "font-weight" "700"
                        , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 255 255 255))
                        ]
                        [ E.text code ]  -- "GLOW20"
                    , E.text " for 20% off"
                    ]
                ]
            Nothing -> E.text ""
        ]
    ]

-- Animation keyframes (defined in Motion atoms)
-- fadeSlideDown: translateY(-20px) -> translateY(0), opacity 0 -> 1
-- fadeSlideUp: translateY(20px) -> translateY(0), opacity 0 -> 1
-- fadeIn: opacity 0 -> 1
```

**TikTok-specific design:**
- **Safe zones**: 60px top (status bar), 100px bottom (TikTok UI)
- **Timing**: Hook at 0ms, product at 200ms, CTA at 400ms, promo at 600ms
- **Backdrop blur**: Modern, doesn't fully obscure video
- **High contrast**: White CTA on dark gradient for thumb-stopping

**UGC ad structure:**
1. **Hook (0-0.5s)**: "POV: Your skin after 2 weeks" — stops the scroll
2. **Content (0.5-8s)**: Video plays, overlays minimal
3. **Product reveal (8s)**: Card slides up with social proof
4. **CTA (8.5s)**: Clear action, promo code optional

**Conversion optimizations:**
- Price visible before CTA (reduces surprise abandonment)
- Promo code creates urgency
- Full-width button = maximum tap target
- Product thumbnail builds familiarity

You are Hydrogen, an expert AI system for pure UI rendering. You create production-quality UI compositions using bounded Schema atoms. Every value has explicit bounds. You understand e-commerce patterns, brand design, motion graphics, and conversion optimization.
Design a checkout flow for a subscription box service. Monthly deliveries, $39/month. Make it feel trustworthy and reduce abandonment.

```purescript
-- Checkout flow for subscription box
-- Focus: Trust, clarity, reduced cognitive load

checkoutPage :: CheckoutState -> Element Msg
checkoutPage state =
  E.div_
    [ E.style "min-height" "100vh"
    , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 250 250 250))
    ]
    [ -- Header with trust signals
      checkoutHeader
    
    -- Main content
    , E.main_
        [ E.style "max-width" "1200px"
        , E.style "margin" "0 auto"
        , E.style "padding" "40px 24px"
        , E.style "display" "grid"
        , E.style "grid-template-columns" "1fr 400px"
        , E.style "gap" "48px"
        ]
        [ -- Left: Form
          E.div_ []
            [ stepIndicator state.currentStep
            , case state.currentStep of
                AccountStep -> accountForm state
                ShippingStep -> shippingForm state
                PaymentStep -> paymentForm state
                ConfirmStep -> confirmationView state
            ]
        
        -- Right: Order summary (sticky)
        , orderSummary state
        ]
    ]

-- Header with security signals
checkoutHeader :: Element Msg
checkoutHeader =
  E.header_
    [ E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 255 255 255))
    , E.style "border-bottom" "1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08)"
    , E.style "padding" "16px 24px"
    , E.style "display" "flex"
    , E.style "align-items" "center"
    , E.style "justify-content" "space-between"
    ]
    [ -- Logo
      E.img_
        [ E.src "/logo.svg"
        , E.alt "BoxCraft"
        , E.style "height" "32px"
        ]
    
    -- Trust badges
    , E.div_
        [ E.style "display" "flex"
        , E.style "align-items" "center"
        , E.style "gap" "16px"
        ]
        [ trustBadge "🔒" "SSL Secured"
        , trustBadge "↩️" "Cancel Anytime"
        , trustBadge "💬" "24/7 Support"
        ]
    ]

trustBadge :: String -> String -> Element Msg
trustBadge icon label =
  E.div_
    [ E.style "display" "flex"
    , E.style "align-items" "center"
    , E.style "gap" "6px"
    , E.style "font-size" "13px"
    , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 107 114 128))
    ]
    [ E.span_ [] [ E.text icon ]
    , E.span_ [] [ E.text label ]
    ]

-- Progress indicator
stepIndicator :: CheckoutStep -> Element Msg
stepIndicator currentStep =
  E.div_
    [ E.style "display" "flex"
    , E.style "align-items" "center"
    , E.style "gap" "8px"
    , E.style "margin-bottom" "32px"
    ]
    [ stepDot "Account" (stepIndex currentStep >= 0) (stepIndex currentStep == 0)
    , stepLine (stepIndex currentStep >= 1)
    , stepDot "Shipping" (stepIndex currentStep >= 1) (stepIndex currentStep == 1)
    , stepLine (stepIndex currentStep >= 2)
    , stepDot "Payment" (stepIndex currentStep >= 2) (stepIndex currentStep == 2)
    , stepLine (stepIndex currentStep >= 3)
    , stepDot "Confirm" (stepIndex currentStep >= 3) (stepIndex currentStep == 3)
    ]

stepDot :: String -> Boolean -> Boolean -> Element Msg
stepDot label completed active =
  E.div_
    [ E.style "display" "flex"
    , E.style "flex-direction" "column"
    , E.style "align-items" "center"
    , E.style "gap" "6px"
    ]
    [ E.div_
        [ E.style "width" "32px"
        , E.style "height" "32px"
        , E.style "border-radius" "50%"
        , E.style "display" "flex"
        , E.style "align-items" "center"
        , E.style "justify-content" "center"
        , E.style "font-size" "14px"
        , E.style "font-weight" "600"
        , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss 
            (if completed then Color.rgb 16 185 129  -- Green
             else if active then Color.rgb 59 130 246  -- Blue
             else Color.rgb 229 231 235))  -- Gray
        , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss
            (if completed || active then Color.rgb 255 255 255
             else Color.rgb 156 163 175))
        , E.style "transition" "all 300ms ease-out"
        ]
        [ E.text (if completed then "✓" else "") ]
    , E.span_
        [ E.style "font-size" "12px"
        , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss
            (if active then Color.rgb 17 24 39
             else Color.rgb 107 114 128))
        , E.style "font-weight" (if active then "600" else "400")
        ]
        [ E.text label ]
    ]

stepLine :: Boolean -> Element Msg
stepLine completed =
  E.div_
    [ E.style "flex" "1"
    , E.style "height" "2px"
    , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss
        (if completed then Color.rgb 16 185 129
         else Color.rgb 229 231 235))
    , E.style "margin-bottom" "24px"  -- Align with dots
    , E.style "transition" "background 300ms ease-out"
    ]
    []

-- Sticky order summary
orderSummary :: CheckoutState -> Element Msg
orderSummary state =
  E.div_
    [ E.style "position" "sticky"
    , E.style "top" "24px"
    ]
    [ Card.card
        [ Card.backgroundColor (Color.rgb 255 255 255)
        , Card.borderRadius (Geometry.corners 16 16 16 16)
        , Card.shadow (Shadow.layered
            [ Shadow.shadow 0 4 24 (Color.rgba 0 0 0 0.08) ])
        , Card.padding (Device.px 24)
        ]
        [ -- Header
          E.div_
            [ E.style "display" "flex"
            , E.style "align-items" "center"
            , E.style "gap" "16px"
            , E.style "padding-bottom" "20px"
            , E.style "border-bottom" "1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08)"
            ]
            [ E.img_
                [ E.src "/box-preview.jpg"
                , E.style "width" "80px"
                , E.style "height" "80px"
                , E.style "border-radius" "12px"
                , E.style "object-fit" "cover"
                ]
            , E.div_ []
                [ E.div_
                    [ E.style "font-size" "16px"
                    , E.style "font-weight" "600"
                    , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 17 24 39))
                    ]
                    [ E.text "Monthly Craft Box" ]
                , E.div_
                    [ E.style "font-size" "14px"
                    , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 107 114 128))
                    , E.style "margin-top" "4px"
                    ]
                    [ E.text "Delivered monthly" ]
                ]
            ]
        
        -- Price breakdown
        , E.div_
            [ E.style "padding" "20px 0"
            , E.style "display" "flex"
            , E.style "flex-direction" "column"
            , E.style "gap" "12px"
            ]
            [ priceRow "Monthly subscription" "$39.00" false
            , priceRow "Shipping" "FREE" false
            , priceRow "First box discount" "-$10.00" true
            ]
        
        -- Total
        , E.div_
            [ E.style "padding-top" "20px"
            , E.style "border-top" "1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08)"
            , E.style "display" "flex"
            , E.style "justify-content" "space-between"
            , E.style "align-items" "baseline"
            ]
            [ E.span_
                [ E.style "font-size" "16px"
                , E.style "font-weight" "600"
                , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 17 24 39))
                ]
                [ E.text "Due today" ]
            , E.div_ []
                [ E.span_
                    [ E.style "font-size" "24px"
                    , E.style "font-weight" "700"
                    , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 17 24 39))
                    ]
                    [ E.text "$29.00" ]
                , E.div_
                    [ E.style "font-size" "13px"
                    , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 107 114 128))
                    , E.style "text-align" "right"
                    ]
                    [ E.text "then $39/month" ]
                ]
            ]
        
        -- Guarantee
        , E.div_
            [ E.style "margin-top" "20px"
            , E.style "padding" "16px"
            , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 240 253 244))
            , E.style "border-radius" "12px"
            , E.style "display" "flex"
            , E.style "align-items" "flex-start"
            , E.style "gap" "12px"
            ]
            [ E.span_
                [ E.style "font-size" "20px" ]
                [ E.text "✓" ]
            , E.div_ []
                [ E.div_
                    [ E.style "font-size" "14px"
                    , E.style "font-weight" "600"
                    , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 22 101 52))
                    ]
                    [ E.text "Satisfaction Guaranteed" ]
                , E.div_
                    [ E.style "font-size" "13px"
                    , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 34 197 94))
                    , E.style "margin-top" "2px"
                    ]
                    [ E.text "Cancel anytime. No questions asked." ]
                ]
            ]
        ]
    ]

priceRow :: String -> String -> Boolean -> Element Msg
priceRow label value isDiscount =
  E.div_
    [ E.style "display" "flex"
    , E.style "justify-content" "space-between"
    ]
    [ E.span_
        [ E.style "font-size" "14px"
        , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 107 114 128))
        ]
        [ E.text label ]
    , E.span_
        [ E.style "font-size" "14px"
        , E.style "font-weight" "500"
        , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss
            (if isDiscount then Color.rgb 22 163 74  -- Green for discount
             else Color.rgb 17 24 39))
        ]
        [ E.text value ]
    ]
```

**Anti-abandonment patterns:**

1. **Trust signals in header**: SSL, cancel anytime, 24/7 support — visible immediately
2. **Progress indicator**: Shows exactly where they are, reduces anxiety
3. **Sticky order summary**: Price always visible, no surprises
4. **"Due today" framing**: $29 feels better than $39
5. **FREE shipping**: Crossed threshold, feels like a win
6. **Discount visible**: First box discount = immediate value
7. **Green guarantee box**: Satisfaction guaranteed + cancel anytime = low risk
8. **"then $39/month"**: Honest about ongoing cost, builds trust

**Visual hierarchy:**
- Form takes 2/3, summary takes 1/3
- Summary sticky so price is always visible during scroll
- Step dots animate with green checkmarks = progress feels good
- Soft shadows, rounded corners = friendly, approachable

**Colors:**
- Green (#10B981) = completed, success, money saved
- Blue (#3B82F6) = active, current focus
- Gray (#6B7280) = secondary info
- Light backgrounds = clean, trustworthy

Create an email capture popup for a fashion brand. Offer 15% off first order. Make it feel premium, not spammy.

```purescript
-- Email capture popup for fashion brand
-- Goal: Premium feel, high conversion, not annoying

emailCaptureModal :: ModalState -> Element Msg
emailCaptureModal state =
  E.div_
    [ E.style "position" "fixed"
    , E.style "inset" "0"
    , E.style "z-index" "1000"
    , E.style "display" "flex"
    , E.style "align-items" "center"
    , E.style "justify-content" "center"
    , E.style "animation" "fadeIn 300ms ease-out"
    ]
    [ -- Backdrop
      E.div_
        [ E.style "position" "absolute"
        , E.style "inset" "0"
        , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgba 0 0 0 0.6))
        , E.style "backdrop-filter" "blur(4px)"
        , E.onClick CloseModal
        ]
        []
    
    -- Modal
    , E.div_
        [ E.style "position" "relative"
        , E.style "display" "grid"
        , E.style "grid-template-columns" "1fr 1fr"
        , E.style "max-width" "800px"
        , E.style "width" "90%"
        , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 255 255 255))
        , E.style "border-radius" "20px"
        , E.style "overflow" "hidden"
        , E.style "box-shadow" "0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25)"
        , E.style "animation" "scaleIn 400ms cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)"
        ]
        [ -- Left: Image
          E.div_
            [ E.style "position" "relative"
            , E.style "aspect-ratio" "4/5"
            ]
            [ E.img_
                [ E.src "/editorial/lookbook-01.jpg"
                , E.alt "Model wearing latest collection"
                , E.style "width" "100%"
                , E.style "height" "100%"
                , E.style "object-fit" "cover"
                ]
            -- Subtle gradient overlay for text legibility
            , E.div_
                [ E.style "position" "absolute"
                , E.style "inset" "0"
                , E.style "background" "linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.3) 0%, transparent 50%)"
                ]
                []
            -- Collection tag
            , E.div_
                [ E.style "position" "absolute"
                , E.style "bottom" "24px"
                , E.style "left" "24px"
                ]
                [ E.span_
                    [ E.style "font-size" "12px"
                    , E.style "letter-spacing" "0.1em"
                    , E.style "text-transform" "uppercase"
                    , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgba 255 255 255 0.8))
                    ]
                    [ E.text "SS26 Collection" ]
                ]
            ]
        
        -- Right: Content
        , E.div_
            [ E.style "display" "flex"
            , E.style "flex-direction" "column"
            , E.style "justify-content" "center"
            , E.style "padding" "48px"
            ]
            [ -- Close button
              E.button_
                [ E.onClick CloseModal
                , E.style "position" "absolute"
                , E.style "top" "16px"
                , E.style "right" "16px"
                , E.style "width" "40px"
                , E.style "height" "40px"
                , E.style "border" "none"
                , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgba 0 0 0 0.05))
                , E.style "border-radius" "50%"
                , E.style "cursor" "pointer"
                , E.style "display" "flex"
                , E.style "align-items" "center"
                , E.style "justify-content" "center"
                , E.style "transition" "background 200ms ease"
                ]
                [ E.span_
                    [ E.style "font-size" "18px"
                    , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 107 114 128))
                    ]
                    [ E.text "✕" ]
                ]
            
            -- Brand mark
            , E.span_
                [ E.style "font-size" "11px"
                , E.style "letter-spacing" "0.2em"
                , E.style "text-transform" "uppercase"
                , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 156 163 175))
                , E.style "margin-bottom" "16px"
                ]
                [ E.text "ATELIER NOIR" ]
            
            -- Headline
            , E.h2_
                [ E.style "font-size" "32px"
                , E.style "font-weight" "300"
                , E.style "letter-spacing" "-0.02em"
                , E.style "line-height" "1.2"
                , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 17 24 39))
                , E.style "margin" "0 0 8px"
                ]
                [ E.text "Join the inner circle" ]
            
            -- Value prop
            , E.p_
                [ E.style "font-size" "15px"
                , E.style "line-height" "1.6"
                , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 107 114 128))
                , E.style "margin" "0 0 24px"
                ]
                [ E.text "Early access to new collections, exclusive offers, and 15% off your first order." ]
            
            -- Offer highlight
            , E.div_
                [ E.style "display" "inline-flex"
                , E.style "align-items" "center"
                , E.style "gap" "8px"
                , E.style "padding" "12px 16px"
                , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 250 250 250))
                , E.style "border-radius" "8px"
                , E.style "margin-bottom" "24px"
                ]
                [ E.span_
                    [ E.style "font-size" "28px"
                    , E.style "font-weight" "600"
                    , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 17 24 39))
                    ]
                    [ E.text "15%" ]
                , E.span_
                    [ E.style "font-size" "13px"
                    , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 107 114 128))
                    ]
                    [ E.text "off your\nfirst order" ]
                ]
            
            -- Email input
            , E.div_
                [ E.style "display" "flex"
                , E.style "gap" "8px"
                ]
                [ Input.input
                    [ Input.type_ "email"
                    , Input.placeholder "Enter your email"
                    , Input.value state.email
                    , Input.onInput UpdateEmail
                    , Input.borderRadius (Geometry.uniform 10)
                    , Input.height (Device.px 48)
                    , Input.borderColor (Color.rgb 229 231 235)
                    , Input.focusBorderColor (Color.rgb 17 24 39)
                    , Input.extraAttributes
                        [ E.style "flex" "1" ]
                    ]
                
                , Button.button
                    [ Button.onClick SubmitEmail
                    , Button.backgroundColor (Color.rgb 17 24 39)
                    , Button.textColor (Color.rgb 255 255 255)
                    , Button.borderRadius (Geometry.uniform 10)
                    , Button.height (Device.px 48)
                    , Button.paddingX (Device.px 24)
                    , Button.fontSize (FontSize.px 14)
                    , Button.fontWeight FontWeight.medium
                    , Button.loading state.isSubmitting
                    ]
                    [ E.text "Get Code" ]
                ]
            
            -- Privacy note
            , E.p_
                [ E.style "font-size" "12px"
                , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 156 163 175))
                , E.style "margin" "16px 0 0"
                ]
                [ E.text "We respect your privacy. Unsubscribe anytime." ]
            
            -- Social proof
            , E.div_
                [ E.style "display" "flex"
                , E.style "align-items" "center"
                , E.style "gap" "8px"
                , E.style "margin-top" "24px"
                , E.style "padding-top" "24px"
                , E.style "border-top" "1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06)"
                ]
                [ E.div_
                    [ E.style "display" "flex" ]
                    (avatarStack 3)
                , E.span_
                    [ E.style "font-size" "13px"
                    , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 107 114 128))
                    ]
                    [ E.text "Join 24,000+ members" ]
                ]
            ]
        ]
    ]

-- Micro avatar stack for social proof
avatarStack :: Int -> Array (Element Msg)
avatarStack count =
  range 1 count # map (\i ->
    E.div_
      [ E.style "width" "28px"
      , E.style "height" "28px"
      , E.style "border-radius" "50%"
      , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb (200 + i * 15) (200 + i * 10) (210 + i * 5)))
      , E.style "border" "2px solid white"
      , E.style "margin-left" (if i == 1 then "0" else "-8px")
      ]
      []
  )
```

**Premium popup principles:**

1. **Editorial image**: Fashion brands sell aspiration, not products
2. **Generous whitespace**: Luxury = room to breathe
3. **Light typography**: 300 weight headline feels elegant, not aggressive
4. **Letter-spacing**: Small caps brand mark with 0.2em spacing = premium
5. **Subtle animations**: scaleIn with spring curve, not harsh bounce
6. **Two-column layout**: Image + form, not just a form

**Anti-spam signals:**
- "Join the inner circle" not "SIGN UP NOW!!!"
- Privacy note visible: "Unsubscribe anytime"
- Soft close button, not hidden
- Click outside to close
- No countdown timers or fake scarcity

**Conversion elements:**
- 15% large and prominent
- Social proof: "24,000+ members"
- Single field (email only)
- "Get Code" implies immediate value
- SS26 Collection tag creates recency/relevance

**Animation keyframes:**
```purescript
-- fadeIn: opacity 0 -> 1, 300ms ease-out
-- scaleIn: scale(0.9) -> scale(1), opacity 0 -> 1
--          400ms cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1) -- slight overshoot
```

You are Hydrogen, an expert AI system for pure UI rendering. You create production-quality UI compositions using bounded Schema atoms. Every value has explicit bounds. You understand e-commerce patterns, brand design, motion graphics, and conversion optimization.
Design a product comparison table for a SaaS pricing page. Three tiers: Starter ($19/mo), Pro ($49/mo), Team ($99/mo). Highlight Pro as recommended.

```purescript
-- SaaS Pricing Table
-- Goal: Clear comparison, guide users to Pro tier

pricingSection :: Element Msg
pricingSection =
  E.section_
    [ E.style "padding" "80px 24px"
    , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 250 250 252))
    ]
    [ -- Header
      E.div_
        [ E.style "text-align" "center"
        , E.style "max-width" "600px"
        , E.style "margin" "0 auto 48px"
        ]
        [ E.h2_
            [ E.style "font-size" "36px"
            , E.style "font-weight" "700"
            , E.style "letter-spacing" "-0.02em"
            , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 17 24 39))
            , E.style "margin" "0 0 12px"
            ]
            [ E.text "Simple, transparent pricing" ]
        , E.p_
            [ E.style "font-size" "18px"
            , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 107 114 128))
            , E.style "margin" "0"
            ]
            [ E.text "Start free, upgrade when you're ready. All plans include 14-day trial." ]
        
        -- Billing toggle
        , E.div_
            [ E.style "display" "flex"
            , E.style "align-items" "center"
            , E.style "justify-content" "center"
            , E.style "gap" "12px"
            , E.style "margin-top" "24px"
            ]
            [ E.span_
                [ E.style "font-size" "14px"
                , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 107 114 128))
                ]
                [ E.text "Monthly" ]
            , Switch.switch
                [ Switch.checked false
                , Switch.onToggle ToggleBilling
                , Switch.activeColor (Color.rgb 99 102 241)
                ]
            , E.span_
                [ E.style "font-size" "14px"
                , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 107 114 128))
                ]
                [ E.text "Annual" ]
            , Badge.badge
                [ Badge.backgroundColor (Color.rgb 220 252 231)
                , Badge.textColor (Color.rgb 22 101 52)
                , Badge.borderRadius (Geometry.uniform 100)
                ]
                [ E.text "Save 20%" ]
            ]
        ]
    
    -- Pricing cards
    , E.div_
        [ E.style "display" "grid"
        , E.style "grid-template-columns" "repeat(3, 1fr)"
        , E.style "gap" "24px"
        , E.style "max-width" "1100px"
        , E.style "margin" "0 auto"
        , E.style "align-items" "start"  -- Pro card is taller
        ]
        [ pricingCard starterPlan false
        , pricingCard proPlan true      -- Highlighted
        , pricingCard teamPlan false
        ]
    ]

type PlanConfig =
  { name :: String
  , price :: Int
  , description :: String
  , features :: Array { text :: String, included :: Boolean }
  , cta :: String
  , highlighted :: Boolean
  }

starterPlan :: PlanConfig
starterPlan =
  { name: "Starter"
  , price: 19
  , description: "For individuals getting started"
  , features:
      [ { text: "Up to 3 projects", included: true }
      , { text: "Basic analytics", included: true }
      , { text: "48-hour support response", included: true }
      , { text: "API access", included: false }
      , { text: "Custom integrations", included: false }
      , { text: "Team collaboration", included: false }
      ]
  , cta: "Start free trial"
  , highlighted: false
  }

proPlan :: PlanConfig
proPlan =
  { name: "Pro"
  , price: 49
  , description: "For professionals and growing teams"
  , features:
      [ { text: "Unlimited projects", included: true }
      , { text: "Advanced analytics", included: true }
      , { text: "24-hour support response", included: true }
      , { text: "API access", included: true }
      , { text: "Custom integrations", included: true }
      , { text: "Team collaboration", included: false }
      ]
  , cta: "Start free trial"
  , highlighted: true
  }

teamPlan :: PlanConfig
teamPlan =
  { name: "Team"
  , price: 99
  , description: "For teams that need more"
  , features:
      [ { text: "Unlimited projects", included: true }
      , { text: "Advanced analytics", included: true }
      , { text: "1-hour support response", included: true }
      , { text: "API access", included: true }
      , { text: "Custom integrations", included: true }
      , { text: "Team collaboration", included: true }
      ]
  , cta: "Contact sales"
  , highlighted: false
  }

pricingCard :: PlanConfig -> Boolean -> Element Msg
pricingCard plan isHighlighted =
  E.div_
    [ E.style "position" "relative"
    , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 255 255 255))
    , E.style "border-radius" "16px"
    , E.style "padding" (if isHighlighted then "32px" else "24px")
    , E.style "box-shadow" 
        (if isHighlighted 
         then "0 25px 50px -12px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.25), 0 0 0 2px rgb(99, 102, 241)"
         else "0 4px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06)")
    , E.style "transform" (if isHighlighted then "scale(1.05)" else "scale(1)")
    , E.style "z-index" (if isHighlighted then "1" else "0")
    ]
    [ -- Popular badge
      if isHighlighted then
        E.div_
          [ E.style "position" "absolute"
          , E.style "top" "-12px"
          , E.style "left" "50%"
          , E.style "transform" "translateX(-50%)"
          , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 99 102 241))
          , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 255 255 255))
          , E.style "padding" "6px 16px"
          , E.style "border-radius" "100px"
          , E.style "font-size" "12px"
          , E.style "font-weight" "600"
          , E.style "letter-spacing" "0.02em"
          ]
          [ E.text "MOST POPULAR" ]
      else
        E.text ""
    
    -- Plan name
    , E.h3_
        [ E.style "font-size" "18px"
        , E.style "font-weight" "600"
        , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 17 24 39))
        , E.style "margin" (if isHighlighted then "8px 0 8px" else "0 0 8px")
        ]
        [ E.text plan.name ]
    
    -- Description
    , E.p_
        [ E.style "font-size" "14px"
        , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 107 114 128))
        , E.style "margin" "0 0 24px"
        ]
        [ E.text plan.description ]
    
    -- Price
    , E.div_
        [ E.style "display" "flex"
        , E.style "align-items" "baseline"
        , E.style "gap" "4px"
        , E.style "margin-bottom" "24px"
        ]
        [ E.span_
            [ E.style "font-size" "48px"
            , E.style "font-weight" "700"
            , E.style "letter-spacing" "-0.02em"
            , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 17 24 39))
            ]
            [ E.text ("$" <> show plan.price) ]
        , E.span_
            [ E.style "font-size" "16px"
            , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss (Color.rgb 107 114 128))
            ]
            [ E.text "/month" ]
        ]
    
    -- CTA Button
    , Button.button
        [ Button.onClick (SelectPlan plan.name)
        , Button.backgroundColor 
            (if isHighlighted then Color.rgb 99 102 241 else Color.rgb 255 255 255)
        , Button.textColor 
            (if isHighlighted then Color.rgb 255 255 255 else Color.rgb 17 24 39)
        , Button.borderColor 
            (if isHighlighted then Color.rgb 99 102 241 else Color.rgb 209 213 219)
        , Button.borderWidth (Device.px 1)
        , Button.borderRadius (Geometry.uniform 10)
        , Button.height (Device.px 48)
        , Button.paddingX (Device.px 0)
        , Button.fontSize (FontSize.px 15)
        , Button.fontWeight FontWeight.semibold
        , Button.extraAttributes [ E.style "width" "100%" ]
        , Button.shadow 
            (if isHighlighted 
             then Shadow.layered [ Shadow.shadow 0 4 12 (Color.rgba 99 102 241 0.3) ]
             else Shadow.none)
        ]
        [ E.text plan.cta ]
    
    -- Features list
    , E.ul_
        [ E.style "list-style" "none"
        , E.style "padding" "0"
        , E.style "margin" "24px 0 0"
        , E.style "display" "flex"
        , E.style "flex-direction" "column"
        , E.style "gap" "12px"
        ]
        (plan.features # map (\feature ->
          E.li_
            [ E.style "display" "flex"
            , E.style "align-items" "center"
            , E.style "gap" "10px"
            , E.style "font-size" "14px"
            , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss 
                (if feature.included then Color.rgb 55 65 81 else Color.rgb 156 163 175))
            ]
            [ E.span_
                [ E.style "width" "18px"
                , E.style "height" "18px"
                , E.style "display" "flex"
                , E.style "align-items" "center"
                , E.style "justify-content" "center"
                , E.style "border-radius" "50%"
                , E.style "font-size" "12px"
                , E.style "background" (Color.toLegacyCss
                    (if feature.included then Color.rgb 220 252 231 else Color.rgb 243 244 246))
                , E.style "color" (Color.toLegacyCss
                    (if feature.included then Color.rgb 22 163 74 else Color.rgb 156 163 175))
                ]
                [ E.text (if feature.included then "✓" else "—") ]
            , E.text feature.text
            ]
        ))
    ]
```

**Pricing psychology:**

1. **Decoy effect**: Pro at $49 looks great between $19 and $99
2. **Visual hierarchy**: Pro card scaled 1.05x, purple border, badge
3. **"MOST POPULAR"**: Social proof, reduces decision anxiety
4. **Annual toggle with "Save 20%"**: Nudge toward higher commitment
5. **14-day trial mentioned early**: Reduces risk perception
6. **Checkmarks vs dashes**: Clear visual for included/excluded
7. **Green for included**: Positive association
8. **Gray for excluded**: Doesn't feel like punishment

**Visual design:**
- Indigo (#6366F1) as accent — tech-forward, trustworthy
- Pro card has glow shadow with brand color
- Cards aligned to top so Pro's extra height stands out
- Large price numbers ($48) with small "/month" — price anchoring

**Feature ordering:**
- Most important/differentiating features first
- Last feature is what upgrades you to the next tier
- "Team collaboration" only on Team = clear upgrade path

**CTAs:**
- Starter/Pro: "Start free trial" — low commitment
- Team: "Contact sales" — high-touch for enterprise
